_metadata.description: ATRA Proprietary Industry Blacklist — Hashed Entity Identifiers
_metadata.format: SHA-256 hashes of entity_name.strip().lower() and registration numbers
_metadata.note: Clear-text entity names are NEVER stored in this file. Use scripts/hash_entity.py to add entries.
_metadata.access_control: Sentinel Agent read-only. Write access: ATRA Principal only.

_instructions.warning: Never commit clear-text names of blacklisted entities to version control
